content: Better Auth 1.6.20 social providers are config-only additions — no new npm package required since better-auth is already installed. Add socialProviders.google and socialProviders.github to auth config with clientId/clientSecret from env vars. Callback URLs follow pattern /api/auth/callback/google and /api/auth/callback/github. Account linking works automatically when emails match across providers. GitHub requires user:email scope. Google may need prompt:select_account for forced account-picker UX. Client-side: authClient.signIn.social({ provider: 'google' }) — same authClient already used for email/password.
